description: Lead is considering selling the property but exploring STR as an alternative or interim use. If STR income is compelling enough, may decide to hold. Low conversion probability — the mental model is exit, not investment.
key_drivers: exploring all options before committing to sale
STR income could be reason to hold rather than sell
key_objections: selling is simpler and more certain
STR feels like delaying the inevitable
property needs work before either use
what_resonates: STR income significantly higher than expected
STR as interim use while deciding
property value maintained or increased during STR period
pitch_angle: Before you sell, run the numbers. STR can generate substantial monthly income — that is materially more than selling the property and putting the proceeds into savings. The property goes up in value while you earn.
critical_note: 100% loss rate in this profile type so far (3 out of 3 lost). Treat SELL profile leads as low priority unless income numbers are dramatically compelling.

lost_leads.name: Oliver
lost_leads.lost_reason: Did not convert from sell-to-STR consideration.

lost_leads.name: Gary
lost_leads.lost_reason: Preferred to sell or keep LTL.
